name: E Emon Porichoy
overview: Nayon reaches Dhaka, intending to kill Mahin Mirza Rudra, a political leader, to avenge her brother's death. But, she falls in love with Rudra and learns the truth as secrets unfold.

trailers.title: Ey Emon Porichoy | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Premieres October 27 On ZEE5
